title: Utility — HTTP & Network Layer

properties: -request: array{url: non-empty-string, options?: mixed[], copyTo?: string|null}

methods: +__construct(request: array, code: ?int, headers: array, body: ?string, curlInfo: array)

properties: -contextOptions: ?array{http: array{proxy: string, header?: string, request_fulluri?: bool}}

-initDownload(resolve: callable, reject: callable, origin: string, url: string, options: array, copyTo: ?string, attributes: array): int
-isAuthenticatedRetryNeeded(job: Job, response: Response): array{retry: bool, storeAuth: bool|string}
-restartJob(job: Job, url: string, attributes: array): void
-restartJobWithDelay(job: Job, url: string, attributes: array): void
-failResponse(job: Job, response: Response, errorMessage: string): TransportException

methods: +{static} getContext(url: string, defaultOptions: array, defaultParams: array): resource
+{static} initOptions(url: string, options: array, forCurl: bool = false): array

classes.name: RemoteFilesystem
methods: +__construct(io: IOInterface, config: Config, options: array, disableTls: bool, authHelper: ?AuthHelper)
+copy(originUrl: string, fileUrl: string, fileName: string, progress: bool, options: array): bool
+getContents(originUrl: string, fileUrl: string, progress: bool, options: array): bool|string
#get(originUrl: string, fileUrl: string, additionalOptions: array, fileName: ?string, progress: bool): bool|string
#getRemoteContents(originUrl: string, fileUrl: string, context: resource, responseHeaders: ?array, maxFileSize: ?int): string|false
#callbackGet(notificationCode: int, severity: int, message: ?string, messageCode: int, bytesTransferred: int, bytesMax: int): void
-handleRedirect(responseHeaders: array, additionalOptions: array, result: string|false): bool|string

classes.name: SyncHelper
methods: +{static} downloadAndInstallPackageSync(loop: Loop, downloader: DownloaderInterface|DownloadManager, path: string, package: PackageInterface, prevPackage: ?PackageInterface): void

key_design_patterns: CurlDownloader: Async multi-handle curl with Job queue and promise callbacks
StreamContextFactory: Static factory for PHP stream contexts and TLS defaults
TlsHelper: Static utility (deprecated, delegates to CaBundle)
RemoteFilesystem: Template method pattern (get() calls getRemoteContents(), callbackGet() as notification hook)
important_notes: CurlDownloader and RemoteFilesystem are two separate HTTP transports: curl-based (async) vs stream-based (sync)
CurlDownloader uses React promises; download() returns a job ID, tick() drives the event loop
RemoteFilesystem is the legacy stream-based downloader; supports degraded mode on timeout
ProxyManager reads http_proxy/https_proxy/no_proxy from $_SERVER; CLI-only for http_proxy for security
StreamContextFactory.initOptions() adds User-Agent header automatically; forCurl=true skips proxy setup
StreamContextFactory.getTlsDefaults() sets strong cipher list, verify_peer=true, uses CaBundle for cafile/capath
TlsHelper is @deprecated since Composer 2.x; checkCertificateHost matches CN and SAN including wildcards
RequestProxy.none() = no proxy configured; RequestProxy.noProxy() = URL excluded by no_proxy env
SyncHelper.downloadAndInstallPackageSync wraps async Loop+promises into a synchronous download+install sequence
